metadata.title: Common CANoe Test Scenarios → Required Knowledge
metadata.description: Mapping of common test scenarios to the exact knowledge base pages an agent should consult. Designed to be the first lookup for a test-generation agent.

scenarios.title: Send a CAN frame in CAPL
scenarios.context: Use `output(msg)` to send. Channels: msg.CAN, msg.CHANNEL. For periodic send use setTimer/CAPL Test Module.

scenarios.title: Set a signal value (test, simulation, or panel-binding)
scenarios.context: In v15 the typed setSignal{Int,Float,Byte,...} family was removed - there is only setSignal(name, value) which auto-converts based on the signal's database type. The CommunicationObjects::SetSignal is a method for CO references. extras/team/setSignalDword is the project's wrapper that adds range validation + telemetry logging.

scenarios.title: Wait for a signal to meet a condition (test module)
scenarios.context: Use TestWaitForXxx in test modules; use ChkCreate_Xxx in network monitoring checks. Test functions return test verdicts.

scenarios.title: Open a UDS diagnostic session and run services
scenarios.context: UDS pattern (v15): diagSetTarget(ecu) → build diagRequest/Response objects → diagSendRequest(req) → DiagGenerateKeyFromSeed (for 0x27) → DiagSendPositiveResponse (for test). NOTE: diagSetCurrentSession is OBSOLETE in v15 - use the option parameter on DiagGenerateKeyFromSeed / diagStartGenerateKeyFromSeed (form 2 and 4) and TestWaitForGenerateKeyFromSeed. See UDS_Overview for full SID table.

scenarios.title: Read DTCs (fault codes)
scenarios.context: UDS 0x19 subfunctions: 0x01 byStatusMask, 0x02 byDTCNumber, 0x04 snapshot, 0x06 extendedData. The DiagGetDTC helper in diagnostics/Common is a hand-curated overview; for real usage build a diagRequest with the 0x19 SID + subfunction, then diagSendRequest and parse with diagGetParameter.

scenarios.title: Bind a CAPL symbol to a Panel Button control
scenarios.context: Button has Pressed/Released properties → symbol gets value. Use setControlProperty to change at runtime.

scenarios.title: Add / use a DBC attribute (e.g. BusType, GenSigStartValue)
scenarios.context: v15 added: BO_TX_BU_, CAT_, CAT_DEF_, FILTER, SIG_VALTYPE_. See diff_dbc_v12_to_v15.json. For Object Attributes reference, see DBC menus section.

scenarios.title: Write a vTESTstudio test module (CAPL test)
scenarios.context: vTESTstudio modules use TestCaseTitle/TestCaseDescription/TestGroupBegin-TestGroupEnd as structural markers. TestCase/TestSet/TestGroup themselves are the vTESTstudio editor concepts (not CAPL functions). Check CI_Pipeline_Reference for build/run patterns.

scenarios.title: XCP calibration: read/write a2l parameter
scenarios.context: XCP works on top of CAN/Ethernet. Connect → Activate → Read/Write → Disconnect.

scenarios.title: Use timers in CAPL (on timer / setTimer / cancelTimer)
scenarios.context: Common_Gotchas: timers fire even when measurement is paused - cancel in on stop + check isMeasurementRunning() in handler.

usage.for_agents: Match the user's intent to one or more scenarios, then load the listed primary_pages. Cross-reference with extras::team::_root::Common_Gotchas for known pitfalls.
usage.extending: Add new scenarios by appending to this file. Run agent_kb/build_manifest.py to regenerate derived indexes.
